SEARCH
Module geomed.app
Package geomed.app.model

Class RoadNetwork

java.lang.Object
geomed.app.model.RoadNetwork
public class RoadNetwork extends Object
Encapsulates the road network graph structure representing intersections (vertices) and roads (edges).
Version:
1.0

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    RoadNetwork()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addIntersection(Point p)
    Adds a new intersection to the network if it does not already exist.
    RoadEdge
    addRoad(int startIdx, int endIdx, double trafficFactor)
    Creates a road with a specific traffic factor between two intersections identified by their indices.
    RoadEdge
    addRoad(Point start, Point end)
    Connects two points with a road using a default traffic factor of 1.0.
    RoadEdge
    addRoad(Point start, Point end, double trafficFactor)
    Connects two points with a road, ensuring both points are tracked as intersections in the network.
    void
    clear()
    Clears all intersections and roads from the network, resetting it to an empty state.
    Point
    findNearestIntersection(Point p)
    Finds the nearest intersection in the network to a given point.
    List<Point>
    getIntersections()
    Retrieves an unmodifiable view of all intersections in the road network.
    List<RoadEdge>
    getRoads()
    Retrieves an unmodifiable view of all roads in the road network.
    String
    toString()
     

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • RoadNetwork

      public RoadNetwork()

  • Method Details

    • addIntersection

      public void addIntersection(Point p)
      Adds a new intersection to the network if it does not already exist.
      Parameters:
      p - The point representing the intersection to add.

    • findNearestIntersection

      public Point findNearestIntersection(Point p)
      Finds the nearest intersection in the network to a given point. Uses squared Euclidean distance for efficiency.
      Parameters:
      p - The reference point to compare against.
      Returns:
      The nearest intersection Point, or null if the network contains no intersections.

    • addRoad

      public RoadEdge addRoad(int startIdx, int endIdx, double trafficFactor)
      Creates a road with a specific traffic factor between two intersections identified by their indices.
      Parameters:
      startIdx - Index of the starting intersection.
      endIdx - Index of the ending intersection.
      trafficFactor - The traffic factor representing congestion (e.g., 1.0 for normal, >1.0 for traffic jams).
      Returns:
      The created RoadEdge object.

    • addRoad

      public RoadEdge addRoad(Point start, Point end, double trafficFactor)
      Connects two points with a road, ensuring both points are tracked as intersections in the network.
      Parameters:
      start - The starting point of the road.
      end - The ending point of the road.
      trafficFactor - Indicator for traffic jam (congestion multiplier).
      Returns:
      The created RoadEdge object.

    • addRoad

      public RoadEdge addRoad(Point start, Point end)
      Connects two points with a road using a default traffic factor of 1.0. Ensures both points are tracked as intersections in the network.
      Parameters:
      start - The starting point of the road.
      end - The ending point of the road.
      Returns:
      The created RoadEdge object.

    • getIntersections

      public List<Point> getIntersections()
      Retrieves an unmodifiable view of all intersections in the road network.
      Returns:
      A list of Point objects representing the intersections.

    • getRoads

      public List<RoadEdge> getRoads()
      Retrieves an unmodifiable view of all roads in the road network.
      Returns:
      A list of RoadEdge objects representing the roads.

    • clear

      public void clear()
      Clears all intersections and roads from the network, resetting it to an empty state.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
